Meaning.En: A fragrant flowering shrub of the genus Rosa, typically bearing red, pink, white, or yellow flowers with many petals.
Meaning.Example: She picked a red rose from the garden and placed it in a vase.

Situation.Vi: Cảnh người hái hoa hồng trong vườn để làm quà hoặc trang trí.
Situation.En: A scene of someone picking roses from a garden to give as a gift or for decoration.

Situation.Vi: Hoa hồng được dùng trong lễ cưới, bó hoa, hoặc làm nước hoa.
Situation.En: Roses are used in weddings, bouquets, or to make perfume.

Meaning.Vi: trỗi dậy; bay lên (như chim); tăng lên (giá cả, mức độ)
Meaning.En: To move upward or rise, especially suddenly or dramatically; to increase in amount, level, or intensity.
Meaning.Example: The sun rose behind the mountains, painting the sky in hues of orange and pink.

Situation.Vi: Mặt trời mọc vào buổi sáng.
Situation.En: The sun rising in the morning.

Situation.Vi: Giá cả tăng mạnh trong thời kỳ lạm phát.
